objects.name: app_logs
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE app_logs (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                ts TEXT NOT NULL,
                level TEXT NOT NULL,
                message TEXT NOT NULL
            )

objects.name: app_logs_legacy_20250826175446
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE "app_logs_legacy_20250826175446" (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                ts TEXT NOT NULL,
                level TEXT NOT NULL,
                message TEXT NOT NULL
            )

objects.name: check_comment_length
objects.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER check_comment_length
            BEFORE INSERT ON logs
            FOR EACH ROW
            WHEN length(NEW.comment) > 500
            BEGIN
                SELECT RAISE(ABORT, 'Comment too long');
            END

objects.name: idx_app_logs_ts
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_app_logs_ts ON app_logs(ts)

objects.name: idx_logs_action_type
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_logs_action_type ON logs(action_type)

objects.name: idx_logs_email
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_logs_email ON logs(email)

objects.name: idx_logs_email_session_end
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_logs_email_session_end ON logs(email, session_id, status_end_time)

objects.name: idx_logs_session
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_logs_session ON logs(session_id)

objects.name: idx_logs_synced
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_logs_synced ON logs(synced)

objects.name: idx_logs_synced_priority_id
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_logs_synced_priority_id ON logs(synced, priority, id)

objects.name: idx_logs_timestamp
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_logs_timestamp ON logs(timestamp)

objects.name: idx_logs_ts
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_logs_ts ON "app_logs_legacy_20250826175446"(ts)

objects.name: idx_offline_actions_status_ts
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_offline_actions_status_ts ON offline_actions(status, ts)

objects.name: idx_status_events_email_ts
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_status_events_email_ts ON status_events(email, ts_utc)

objects.name: logs
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE logs (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                email TEXT NOT NULL,
                name TEXT NOT NULL,
                status TEXT,
                action_type TEXT NOT NULL,
                comment TEXT,
                timestamp TEXT NOT NULL,
                synced INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                sync_attempts INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                last_sync_attempt TEXT,
                priority INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
                status_start_time TEXT,
                status_end_time TEXT,
                reason TEXT,
                user_group TEXT
            )

objects.name: offline_actions
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE offline_actions (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                ts TEXT NOT NULL,
                action_type TEXT NOT NULL,
                payload TEXT NOT NULL,  -- JSON-строка
                status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'  -- pending|synced|failed
            )

objects.name: prevent_duplicate_logout
objects.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER prevent_duplicate_logout
            BEFORE INSERT ON logs
            FOR EACH ROW
            WHEN LOWER(NEW.action_type) = 'logout' AND EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 FROM logs
                WHERE session_id = NEW.session_id
                  AND LOWER(action_type) = 'logout'
                  AND timestamp > datetime('now', '-5 minutes')
            )
            BEGIN
                SELECT RAISE(ABORT, 'Duplicate LOGOUT action');
            END

objects.name: rule_last_sent
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE rule_last_sent (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    rule_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    email TEXT,
    context TEXT,
    last_sent_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    UNIQUE(rule_id, email, context)
)

objects.name: sqlite_sequence
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE sqlite_sequence(name,seq)

objects.name: status_events
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE status_events (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    email TEXT NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL,
    ts_utc TEXT NOT NULL
)

objects.name: users_cache
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE users_cache (
                email TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                name TEXT,
                role TEXT,
                "group" TEXT,
                shift_hours TEXT,
                telegram_login TEXT,
                updated_at TEXT
            )
